evidence: AMETEK has consistently added to its investment in research, development and engineering, and improved its new product development efforts with the adoption of Design for Six Sigma and Value Analysis/Value Engineering methodologies along with artificial intelligence tools.

Operational Excellence strategies include lean manufacturing, global sourcing, Design for Six Sigma, Value Engineering/Value Analysis, growth kaizens, digitalization and use of artificial intelligence technology.
artificial intelligence tools... have improved the pace and quality of product innovation and resulted in the introduction of a steady stream of new products across all of AMETEK's businesses

Operational Excellence strategies include... digitalization and use of artificial intelligence technology. Each plays an important role in improving efficiency, enhancing the pace and quality of innovation.
misuse of artificial intelligence, human error or malfeasance... these systems, products, data and services may be damaged, compromised, disrupted or shut down
the rapid evolution and adoption of artificial intelligence may increase our cybersecurity risks
no assurance that we will be able to make the technological advances necessary, including through the use of artificial intelligence, to maintain such competitive advantages

limitations: No quantified AI-specific spend, headcount, or capex figures appear in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 3 based on named initiatives without dollar amounts.
AI use cases are named (product innovation, operational excellence) but no deployment metrics or quantified outcomes are disclosed; concreteness capped at 3.
Risk disclosures name AI-specific risk categories (cybersecurity amplification, misuse, competitive technology risk) but provide no quantified risk exposure or named governance/oversight bodies.
